seoTitle: Toonpan vs Toorbul — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Toonpan and Toorbul. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toonpan and Toorbul.
heading: Toonpan vs Toorbul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toonpan, Queensland and Toorbul, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toorbul has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Toonpan (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toonpan or Toorbul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toonpan has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Toorbul scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toonpan scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Toorbul scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toonpan or Toorbul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toorbul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
